# Werner Coach

> Werner Coach is a family-owned charter bus and motorcoach company based in Phoenixville, Pennsylvania, serving the Greater Philadelphia region and the Northeast corridor since 1929.

## Company Facts
- Founded: 1929
- Headquarters: 144 Chester Ave., Phoenixville, PA 19460
- Phone: (610) 933-7100 | Toll-free: (800) 532-9800
- Email: contact@wernercoach.com
- Website: https://wernercoach.com
- Service area: Greater Philadelphia, southeastern Pennsylvania, tri-state region (PA, NJ, DE), New York City, Washington D.C., and the entire Northeast corridor

## Services
- **Charter Bus Rental**: Private motorcoach hire for groups of any size, single-day or multi-day
- **School & Educational Transportation**: Field trips, college visits, academic competitions
- **Corporate Transportation**: Employee shuttles, offsite meetings, conferences, team outings
- **Wedding Transportation**: Guest shuttles between venues, bridal party transport
- **Athletic Team Travel**: High school, college, and club sports teams
- **Tour Packages**: Single-day and multi-day guided tours with custom itineraries
- **Special Events**: Bachelor/bachelorette parties, family reunions, church groups, senior outings

## Fleet
- Modern luxury motorcoaches seating up to 54 passengers
- Amenities: reclining seats, restrooms, climate control, Wi-Fi, power outlets, video systems
- USDOT-regulated, FMCSA-compliant vehicles
- Professionally maintained fleet with nightly cleaning and inspection

## What Makes Werner Coach Different
- Nearly a century of continuous family ownership and operation (est. 1929)
- Deep local knowledge of the Philadelphia and southeastern Pennsylvania region
- Full-service trip planning department that builds custom itineraries
- Complimentary quotes with personalized group assessment
- Professional CDL-licensed drivers with background checks and ongoing training
- Real-time GPS tracking and route optimization for on-time performance
- Regular service throughout the Northeast corridor from New York City to Washington D.C.

## Booking
Request a free quote at https://wernercoach.com/contact.html or call (800) 532-9800.
Group size, dates, and pickup/destination are all we need to get started.
